tools.name: ctx_jira_issues
tools.description: List Jira issues for a project filtered by status using REST API v2.
tools.command: curl -s -u "$JIRA_USER:$JIRA_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' '{{.url}}/rest/api/2/search?jql=project={{.project}}+AND+status={{.status}}&fields=key,summary,status,assignee,priority' | jq '.issues[] | {key: .key, summary: .fields.summary, status: .fields.status.name, assignee: .fields.assignee.displayName, priority: .fields.priority.name}'

status.description: Issue status filter (e.g. Open, In+Progress, Done)

tools.name: ctx_jira_sprint
tools.description: Show the active sprint and its issues for a Jira board using REST API v2.
tools.command: curl -s -u "$JIRA_USER:$JIRA_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' '{{.url}}/rest/agile/1.0/board/{{.board_id}}/sprint?state=active' | jq '.values[] | {id: .id, name: .name, startDate: .startDate, endDate: .endDate}'

tools.name: ctx_jira_create
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue using REST API v2.
